sign-in.title: Sign in
sign-in.success: Access granted. Opening the ColdTrace dashboard...

error.revoked-access: Access revoked. Contact your organization administrator.
error.server-error: We could not validate the account. Try again later.

password-recovery.title: Recover password
password-recovery.subtitle: Enter your account email to continue.
password-recovery.success: Recovery link sent to your email.

error.not-found: There is no account linked to this email.
error.server-error: We could not validate the account. Try again later.

page-not-found.title: Page not found
page-not-found.content: The path {{ invalid_path }} does not exist.

roles-permissions.title: Access Control
roles-permissions.table-subtitle: Review users in the active organization and manage role assignments.
roles-permissions.permissions-subtitle: Toggle permissions by role. The super administrator is fixed with full access.
roles-permissions.create-user-subtitle: Register a user inside the active organization and assign an operational role.
roles-permissions.empty-section-message: This section does not have content yet.

feedback.duplicate-email: A user with this email already exists.
feedback.invalid-role: Select a valid role before saving.
feedback.server-error: We could not load access data. Try again later.

denied.title: Access denied
denied.message: Your current role can review access information, but it cannot create users or update roles and permissions.

asset-management.title: Assets
asset-management.cold-room-subtitle: Register and review cold rooms from the active organization.
asset-management.empty: No cold rooms match this search.

cold-room.title: Cold Room
cold-room.subtitle: Register and review cold rooms from the active organization.
cold-room.form-subtitle: Create a cold room for the active organization.
cold-room.feedback-duplicate: A cold room with this ID already exists.

transport.title: Transport
transport.subtitle: Register and review refrigerated transport units from the active organization.
transport.form-subtitle: Create a refrigerated transport unit for the active organization.
transport.feedback-duplicate: A transport unit with this ID already exists.

iot-devices.title: IoT Devices
iot-devices.subtitle: Review monitoring devices from the active organization.
iot-devices.form-subtitle: Create a monitoring device and optionally assign it to an asset.
iot-devices.empty: No IoT devices registered for this organization.
iot-devices.feedback-duplicate: An IoT device with this ID already exists.

gateways.title: Gateways and locations
gateways.subtitle: Review transmission points used by organization assets and IoT devices.
gateways.form-subtitle: Create a transmission point for an organization location.
gateways.empty: No gateways registered for this organization.
gateways.feedback-duplicate: A gateway with this ID already exists.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Configure operating parameters for organization assets and monitoring devices.

form.asset-types-error: Enter at least one asset type.
form.iot-device-types-error: Enter at least one device type.
form.temperature-range-error: Maximum temperature must be greater than minimum temperature.
form.frequency-error: Enter a frequency greater than zero.

safety-ranges.title: Safety ranges
safety-ranges.subtitle: Configure safe temperature and humidity limits by monitored asset.
safety-ranges.form-subtitle: Select a monitored asset or update the organization default profile.
safety-ranges.feedback-access-denied: Your current role cannot configure safety ranges.
safety-ranges.feedback-error: The range could not be saved. Try again.
safety-ranges.access-description: Users without asset management permission can review ranges, but cannot change them.
safety-ranges.scope-default-description: Used when an asset does not have its own safety range.
safety-ranges.empty: No safety ranges registered for this organization.

form.temperature-range-error: Maximum temperature must be greater than minimum temperature.

safety-ranges.table-subtitle: Ranges remain available after reload and are used by monitoring readings.

operational-parameters.title: Operational parameters
operational-parameters.subtitle: Update reading intervals and evaluation criteria for monitored assets.
operational-parameters.form-subtitle: Select an asset device and adjust the values applied to upcoming readings.
operational-parameters.feedback-invalid: Review the interval and at least one evaluation criterion before saving.
operational-parameters.feedback-incompatible: The selected parameters are not compatible with the asset, device, or gateway.
operational-parameters.feedback-access-denied: Your current role cannot update operational parameters.
operational-parameters.feedback-error: The previous parameters were kept because the update could not be saved.
operational-parameters.access-description: Users without asset management permission can review operational parameters, but cannot change them.
operational-parameters.empty: No operational parameters registered for monitored devices.

compatibility.asset-inactive: Select an active asset before applying operational changes.
compatibility.device-unlinked: The selected device must be linked and online for this asset.
compatibility.gateway-offline: The asset gateway is offline, so the configuration cannot be applied.
compatibility.criteria-incompatible: One or more criteria are not supported by the selected device.

form.frequency-error: Enter a value from 5 to 1440 minutes.

operational-parameters.table-subtitle: Reading intervals are used by logs, reports, and upcoming monitoring readings.

form.name: Name
form.capacity-error: Enter a capacity greater than zero.

feedback.server-error: We could not load asset data. Try again later.

preventive.title: Preventive maintenance
preventive.subtitle: Schedule planned maintenance for cold-chain assets and their monitoring devices.
preventive.form-subtitle: Register the date, scope, and observations for the next preventive intervention.
preventive.feedback-invalid: Review the required date and observations before saving.
preventive.feedback-invalid-asset: Select an active asset before scheduling maintenance.
preventive.feedback-duplicate: There is already an open maintenance schedule for this asset in the selected period.
preventive.feedback-access-denied: Your current role cannot schedule preventive maintenance.
preventive.feedback-error: The maintenance schedule could not be saved. Try again.
preventive.access-description: Users without asset management permission can review maintenance schedules, but cannot create them.
preventive.empty: No preventive maintenance schedules registered for this organization.

form.date-error: Select today or a future date.
form.observations-placeholder: Describe the preventive work to be completed.

preventive.table-subtitle: Open schedules keep the asset under operational follow-up.

technical-service.title: Technical service
technical-service.subtitle: Register corrective service requests and document technical closure evidence.
technical-service.request-subtitle: Open a technical follow-up when an asset has a failure or corrective need.
technical-service.closure-subtitle: Document the intervention and keep the case open when the functional test fails.
technical-service.feedback-request-created: Technical service request was registered successfully.
technical-service.feedback-closed: Technical service was closed with completed intervention evidence.
technical-service.feedback-failed-test: Functional test failed. The service remains open and the asset is pending review.
technical-service.feedback-invalid: Review the required service fields before saving.
technical-service.feedback-invalid-asset: Select a valid active or maintenance asset before requesting service.
technical-service.feedback-missing-evidence: Complete intervention notes and result evidence before closing the service.
technical-service.feedback-access-denied: Your current role cannot manage technical service requests.
technical-service.feedback-error: The technical service request could not be saved. Try again.
technical-service.access-description: Users without asset management permission can review service records, but cannot create or close them.
technical-service.empty: No technical service requests registered for this organization.

form.issue-placeholder: Describe the condition that requires technical service.

technical-service.table-subtitle: Open and pending-review services remain under operational follow-up.

sign-up.title: Create your account
sign-up.success: Organization and super administrator account created.

error.server-error: We could not create the account. Try again later.

operational.title: Main Page
operational.empty-description: Add assets, devices, and readings to see the operational dashboard for this organization.

asset-monitoring.title: Asset monitoring
asset-monitoring.subtitle: Review live readings, linked devices, and thermal status by asset.
asset-monitoring.search-placeholder: Search by asset, ID, location, or notes...
asset-monitoring.empty: No monitored assets match the current filters.

daily-log.title: Daily Log
daily-log.subtitle: Daily thermal control evidence for the active organization.
daily-log.feedback-generated: Daily log generated with the available readings.
daily-log.feedback-error: We could not generate the daily log with the current data.
daily-log.observation-description: {{ count }} asset(s) have fewer readings than expected for the selected day.
daily-log.empty-description: Select another date or verify that assets have readings for this organization.

history.title: Operational History
history.subtitle: Trace readings, alerts, and incidents by asset or period.
history.access-description: Your current role does not include report history permissions.
history.empty-description: Adjust the period, asset, or event type to review another history slice.

messages.reading-in-range: Reading registered inside the configured range {{ range }}.
messages.reading-out-of-range: Reading registered outside the configured range {{ range }}.
messages.high-temperature: Temperature exceeded the configured range {{ range }}.
messages.low-temperature: Temperature fell below the configured range {{ range }}.
messages.low-battery: Device battery dropped below the safe threshold.
messages.low-signal: Device signal dropped below the safe threshold.

incidents.high-temperature: Asset currently reports a high temperature incident.
incidents.low-temperature: Asset currently reports a low temperature incident.
incidents.high-humidity: Asset currently reports a high humidity incident.
incidents.connection-lost: Asset reported a connection loss incident.

monthly.title: Monthly Report
monthly.subtitle: Consolidated monitoring and incident evidence for operational decisions.
monthly.feedback-downloaded: Monthly report downloaded with the consolidated information.
monthly.feedback-insufficient: The selected month does not have enough consolidated information yet.
monthly.feedback-error: We could not build the monthly report. Try again.
monthly.access-description: Your current role does not include monthly report download permissions.
monthly.pending-description: The selected month needs monitoring readings before the file can be generated.
monthly.table-subtitle: Consolidated records from {{ from }} to {{ to }}
monthly.empty-description: Select another month or verify that assets have monitoring readings.

compliance.title: Sanitary Compliance
compliance.subtitle: Export monitoring evidence for internal reviews and sanitary audits.
compliance.feedback-exported: Compliance report exported with the selected monitoring evidence.
compliance.feedback-insufficient: The selected range does not contain enough information to export a report.
compliance.feedback-error: We could not export the compliance report with the current data.
compliance.access-description: Your current role does not include report export permissions.
compliance.observation-description: {{ count }} asset(s) need review before an audit.
compliance.observation-breakdown: {{ missing }} missing / {{ out }} out of range / {{ incidents }} incidents
compliance.empty-description: Select another period or asset with monitoring readings.

findings.title: Compliance Findings
findings.subtitle: Review missing records and potential non-compliance before an audit.
findings.feedback-closed: The finding was closed for the current review.
findings.feedback-access-denied: Your current role cannot close compliance findings.
findings.feedback-error: We could not evaluate compliance findings with the current data.
findings.access-description: Your current role does not include compliance review permissions.
findings.close-access-description: You can inspect the evidence, but closing findings requires operational resolution permissions.
findings.limitation-description: {{ count }} finding(s) are marked as limitations because required monitoring context is missing.
findings.empty-description: Adjust the period, asset, or status filter to review another compliance slice.

messages.missing-device: {{ asset }} has no linked monitoring device for the evaluated period.
messages.missing-settings: {{ asset }} has no safety range configured for a complete check.
messages.missing-readings: {{ actual }} of {{ expected }} expected readings were found.
messages.out-of-range: {{ count }} reading(s) were outside the configured range.
messages.expired-calibration: Device {{ device }} has an expired calibration date: {{ date }}.

audit.title: Audit Evidence
audit.subtitle: Consolidate monitoring, reports, findings, and corrective evidence for reviews.
audit.feedback-exported: Audit evidence exported with the selected period.
audit.feedback-insufficient: The selected period does not contain enough evidence to export.
audit.feedback-error: We could not prepare the audit evidence with the current data.
audit.access-description: Your current role does not include audit evidence permissions.
audit.incomplete-description: {{ count }} checklist item(s) still need evidence before review.
audit.reports-subtitle: Files and report records included in this package.
audit.findings-subtitle: Compliance observations used as pending or corrective evidence.
audit.empty-reports-description: Generate a daily, compliance, or monthly report for this period.
audit.empty-findings-description: No compliance findings were detected for this evidence package.

items.monitoring-readings-incomplete: No monitoring readings were found for this period.
items.generated-reports-incomplete: No generated reports were found for this period.
items.compliance-findings-complete: {{ count }} compliance finding(s) were evaluated without blocking limitations.
items.compliance-findings-incomplete: {{ limitations }} limitation(s) prevent a complete compliance evaluation.
items.incident-records-complete: {{ count }} incident record(s) are included or no incidents were detected.
items.corrective-actions-incomplete: {{ open }} open finding(s) still need corrective action.

incident-list.title: Active Incidents
incident-list.subtitle: Critical and warning alerts requiring acknowledgment.
incident-list.feedback-already-recognized: This incident has already been recognized.
incident-list.feedback-missing-evidence: Register the corrective action and evidence before closing the incident.
incident-list.feedback-condition-active: The condition is still active. Stabilize the asset before closing the incident.
incident-list.feedback-invalid-incident: Select a valid open incident before closing.
incident-list.feedback-access-denied: Your current role cannot close incidents.
incident-list.feedback-error: Could not update the incident. Please try again.
incident-list.closure-subtitle: Document the action taken and close the incident only when the condition has stabilized.
incident-list.form-corrective-placeholder: Example: Products were moved and the thermostat was recalibrated.
incident-list.form-evidence-placeholder: Example: Temperature returned to 4.1°C after 30 minutes.
incident-list.access-description: Your current role does not include permissions to manage incidents.
incident-list.empty-description: All monitored assets are operating within normal parameters.

notification-list.title: Notifications
notification-list.subtitle: Alert dispatch history for active critical incidents.
notification-list.card-subtitle: Simulated app, email and SMS delivery states.
notification-list.empty-description: Critical incidents will create notification records by channel.
